name: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections, each with a trigger and an animated content panel.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style for this item. Overrides the variant inherited from the parent Accordion when set.

inheritedProps.name: onOpenChange
inheritedProps.description: Event handler called when the panel is opened or closed.

inheritedProps.name: render
inheritedProps.description: Allows you to replace the component's HTML element with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style applied to every item. Each AccordionItem can override it locally with its own `variant`. Defaults to `"default"`.

inheritedProps.name: hiddenUntilFound
inheritedProps.description: Allows the browser's built-in page search to find and expand the panel contents.

inheritedProps.name: keepMounted
inheritedProps.description: Whether to keep the element in the DOM while the panel is closed. This prop is ignored when `hiddenUntilFound` is used.

inheritedProps.name: loopFocus
inheritedProps.description: Whether to loop keyboard focus back to the first item when the end of the list is reached while using the arrow keys.

inheritedProps.name: onValueChange
inheritedProps.description: Event handler called when an accordion item is expanded or collapsed. Provides the new value as an argument.

inheritedProps.name: render
inheritedProps.description: Allows you to replace the component's HTML element with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

props.name: indicator
props.description: Built-in collapse/expand indicator placement. - `"chevron"` (default) — down arrow when collapsed, up arrow when open. - `"plus-minus"` — plus glyph when collapsed, minus when open. - `"none"` — suppress the built-in indicator; supply your own as the last child of the trigger (tag it `data-slot="accordion-trigger-icon"` to inherit sizing).

inheritedProps.name: nativeButton
inheritedProps.description: Whether the component renders a native `<button>` element when replacing it via the `render` prop. Set to `false` if the rendered element is not a button (for example, `<div>`).

inheritedProps.name: render
inheritedProps.description: Allows you to replace the component's HTML element with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

parts.name: Accordion
parts.description: A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections, each with a trigger and an animated content panel.

parts.name: AccordionContent
parts.description: Animated panel that reveals the body content of an AccordionItem. Slides open/closed by transitioning `height` between `0` and Base UI's `--accordion-panel-height` variable, driven by `data-starting-style` and `data-ending-style` attributes the primitive sets during enter/exit.

parts.name: AccordionItem
parts.description: A single collapsible section inside an Accordion; wraps one AccordionTrigger and one AccordionContent. Inherits the parent's `variant` unless its own `variant` prop is supplied.

parts.name: AccordionTrigger
parts.description: Clickable header button that expands or collapses an AccordionItem. Renders inside an implicit `<h3>` via `AccordionPrimitive.Header`. Toggles a built-in chevron or plus/minus glyph to reflect the open state, or hides the built-in indicator entirely via `indicator="none"`.

inheritedProps.description: Determines the element to focus when the popup is opened.

inheritedProps.name: render
inheritedProps.description: Allows you to replace the component's HTML element with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

inheritedProps.name: actionsRef
inheritedProps.description: A ref to imperative actions. - `unmount`: When specified, the autocomplete will not be unmounted when closed. Instead, the `unmount` function must be called to unmount the autocomplete manually. Useful when the autocomplete's animation is controlled by an external library.

inheritedProps.name: autoHighlight
inheritedProps.description: Whether the first matching item is highlighted automatically. - `true`: highlight after the user types and keep the highlight while the query changes. - `'always'`: always highlight the first item.

inheritedProps.name: defaultOpen
inheritedProps.description: Whether the popup is initially open.

inheritedProps.name: filteredItems
inheritedProps.description: Filtered items to display in the list. When provided, the list will use these items instead of filtering the `items` prop internally. Use when you want to control filtering logic externally with the `useFilter()` hook.

inheritedProps.name: grid
inheritedProps.description: Whether list items are presented in a grid layout. When enabled, arrow keys navigate across rows and columns inferred from DOM rows.

inheritedProps.name: highlightItemOnHover
inheritedProps.description: Whether moving the pointer over items should highlight them. Disabling this prop allows CSS `:hover` to be differentiated from the `:focus` (`data-highlighted`) state.

inheritedProps.name: inline
inheritedProps.description: Whether the list is rendered inline without using the popup.

inheritedProps.name: inputRef
inheritedProps.description: A ref to the hidden input element.

inheritedProps.name: items
inheritedProps.description: The items to be displayed in the list. Can be either a flat array of items or an array of groups with items.

inheritedProps.name: itemToStringValue
inheritedProps.description: When the item values are objects (`<Autocomplete.Item value={object}>`), this function converts the object value to a string representation for both display in the input and form submission. If the shape of the object is `{ value, label }`, the label will be used automatically without needing to specify this prop.

inheritedProps.name: keepHighlight
inheritedProps.description: Whether the highlighted item should be preserved when the pointer leaves the list.

inheritedProps.name: limit
inheritedProps.description: The maximum number of items to display in the list.

inheritedProps.name: locale
inheritedProps.description: The locale to use for string comparison. Defaults to the user's runtime locale.

inheritedProps.name: loopFocus
inheritedProps.description: Whether to loop keyboard focus back to the input when the end of the list is reached while using the arrow keys. The first item can then be reached by pressing <kbd>ArrowDown</kbd> again from the input, or the last item can be reached by pressing <kbd>ArrowUp</kbd> from the input. The input is always included in the focus loop per [ARIA Authoring Practices](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/combobox/). When disabled, focus does not move when on the last element and the user presses <kbd>ArrowDown</kbd>, or when on the first element and the user presses <kbd>ArrowUp</kbd>.

inheritedProps.name: modal
inheritedProps.description: Determines if the popup enters a modal state when open. - `true`: user interaction is limited to the popup: document page scroll is locked and pointer interactions on outside elements are disabled. - `false`: user interaction with the rest of the document is allowed.

inheritedProps.name: onItemHighlighted
inheritedProps.type: ((highlightedValue: ItemValue | undefined, eventDetails: AutocompleteRootHighlightEventDetails) => void) | undefined
inheritedProps.description: Callback fired when an item is highlighted or unhighlighted. Receives the highlighted item value (or `undefined` if no item is highlighted) and event details with a `reason` property describing why the highlight changed. The `reason` can be: - `'keyboard'`: the highlight changed due to keyboard navigation. - `'pointer'`: the highlight changed due to pointer hovering. - `'none'`: the highlight changed programmatically.

inheritedProps.name: onOpenChange
inheritedProps.description: Event handler called when the popup is opened or closed.

inheritedProps.description: Event handler called after any animations complete when the popup is opened or closed.

inheritedProps.name: onValueChange

inheritedProps.name: open
inheritedProps.description: Whether the popup is currently open. Use when controlled.

inheritedProps.description: Whether the popup opens when clicking the input.

inheritedProps.name: submitOnItemClick
inheritedProps.description: Whether clicking an item should submit the autocomplete's owning form. By default, clicking an item via a pointer or <kbd>Enter</kbd> key does not submit the owning form. Useful when the autocomplete is used as a single-field form search input.

name: Date Input
description: A three-segment MM/DD/YYYY inline date editor with keyboard navigation.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected date; the component mirrors this into its internal segment state on each render cycle.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with a fully valid `Date` whenever the user commits a change; not fired for partial or out-of-range inputs.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `<div>` that provides the border, background, and flex layout.

name: Date Picker
description: A single-date picker that reveals a calendar in a popover.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected date; pass `undefined` to show the placeholder.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the selected `Date` (or `undefined`) when the user picks a day or clears the selection via the calendar.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the calendar from opening.

props.name: required
props.description: When `true`, appends a red asterisk to the label text.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional `<label>` rendered above the trigger button; linked via `htmlFor` to the button's generated id.

props.name: className

props.name: error
props.description: When `true`, applies a destructive border to the trigger button.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Inline message rendered below the trigger when validation fails.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder shown when no date is selected. Defaults to `"Select a date"`.

props.name: formatDate
props.description: Formats the selected date. Defaults to `Intl.DateTimeFormat`.

name: Date Range Picker

props.name: value
props.description: The selected date range.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the date range changes.

props.name: label
props.description: The label text for the date range picker.

props.name: className
props.description: The class name for the root element.

props.name: error

props.name: disabled

name: Date Selector
description: A compact date filter that selects by day, month, quarter, half-year, or year with `is` / `before` / `after` / `between` operators. Reorders into a popover or dialog by wrapping it; the day view reuses Calendar and the coarser periods render their own grids.

props.name: allowRange
props.description: When `true` (default), enables the `between` range operator.

props.name: baseYear
props.description: Centre year for the generated year list. Defaults to the current year.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes for the root element.

props.name: dayDateFormat
props.description: `date-fns` format used to render and parse day values.

props.name: dayDateFormats
props.description: Extra `date-fns` formats accepted when parsing typed input.

props.name: defaultFilterType
props.description: The operator selected on first render. Defaults to `"is"`.

props.name: defaultPeriodType
props.description: The period selected on first render. Defaults to `"day"`.

props.name: i18n
props.description: Partial i18n overrides merged over the English defaults.

props.name: inputHint
props.description: When set, the input becomes editable and shows this hint while focused.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional heading rendered beside the operator tabs.

props.name: maxYear
props.description: Upper bound (inclusive) of the year list.

props.name: minYear
props.description: Lower bound (inclusive) of the year list.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called whenever the selection changes.

props.name: periodTypes
props.description: Restricts which period tabs are shown, in order.

props.name: presetMode
props.description: Locks the operator to a fixed value and disables the operator tabs.

props.name: showInput
props.description: When `true` (default), renders the text input above the picker.

props.name: showTwoMonths
props.description: When `true` (default), the day view shows two months on desktop.

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled selection.

props.name: weekStartsOn
props.description: First day of the week (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday).

props.name: yearRange
props.description: Number of years listed when `minYear`/`maxYear` are not set.

parts.name: DateSelector
parts.description: A compact date filter that selects by day, month, quarter, half-year, or year with `is` / `before` / `after` / `between` operators. Reorders into a popover or dialog by wrapping it; the day view reuses Calendar and the coarser periods render their own grids.

name: Date Field RAC
description: An accessible date field that renders each date part (year, month, day) as individually focusable, spinnable segments.

inheritedProps.name: granularity
inheritedProps.description: Determines the smallest unit that is displayed in the date picker. By default, this is `"day"` for dates, and `"minute"` for times.

inheritedProps.name: hideTimeZone
inheritedProps.description: Whether to hide the time zone abbreviation.

inheritedProps.name: hourCycle
inheritedProps.description: Whether to display the time in 12 or 24 hour format. By default, this is determined by the user's locale.

inheritedProps.name: isDateUnavailable
inheritedProps.description: Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.

inheritedProps.name: isDisabled
inheritedProps.description: Whether the input is disabled.

inheritedProps.name: isInvalid
inheritedProps.description: Whether the input value is invalid.

inheritedProps.name: isReadOnly
inheritedProps.description: Whether the input can be selected but not changed by the user.

inheritedProps.name: isRequired
inheritedProps.description: Whether user input is required on the input before form submission.

inheritedProps.name: maxValue
inheritedProps.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select.

inheritedProps.name: minValue
inheritedProps.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select.

inheritedProps.name: onFocusChange
inheritedProps.description: Handler that is called when the element's focus status changes.

inheritedProps.name: placeholderValue
inheritedProps.description: A placeholder date that influences the format of the placeholder shown when no value is selected. Defaults to today's date at midnight.

inheritedProps.name: render
inheritedProps.description: Overrides the default DOM element with a custom render function. This allows rendering existing components with built-in styles and behaviors such as router links, animation libraries, and pre-styled components.

inheritedProps.name: shouldForceLeadingZeros
inheritedProps.description: Whether to always show leading zeros in the month, day, and hour fields. By default, this is determined by the user's locale.

inheritedProps.name: validate
inheritedProps.description: A function that returns an error message if a given value is invalid. Validation errors are displayed to the user when the form is submitted if `validationBehavior="native"`. For realtime validation, use the `isInvalid` prop instead.

inheritedProps.name: validationBehavior
inheritedProps.description: Whether to use native HTML form validation to prevent form submission when the value is missing or invalid, or mark the field as required or invalid via ARIA.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the React Aria `DateInput` element via `composeRenderProps`; appended after the default dateInputStyle classes (or all classes when `unstyled` is `true`).

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When `true`, suppresses the default dateInputStyle base classes so the container can be fully re-styled by the caller.

inheritedProps.name: render
inheritedProps.description: Overrides the default DOM element with a custom render function. This allows rendering existing components with built-in styles and behaviors such as router links, animation libraries, and pre-styled components.

parts.name: DateField
parts.description: An accessible date field that renders each date part (year, month, day) as individually focusable, spinnable segments.

parts.name: DateInput
parts.description: The styled segment container for a DateField or TimeField; renders each date/time part via DateSegment.

parts.name: DateSegment
parts.description: A single editable segment (e.g. month, day, year, hour) inside a DateInput; handles focus, placeholder, and validation highlight styles.

parts.name: TimeField
parts.description: An accessible time field that renders hour, minute, second, and AM/PM as individually focusable, spinnable segments.

name: Description List
description: Semantic description list root (`<dl>`). Compose with DescriptionTerm and DescriptionDetails to build accessible key–value displays.

props.name: divided
props.description: Adds a subtle bottom border between rows (horizontal orientation only).

parts.name: DescriptionDetails
parts.description: The details/value element (`<dd>`) paired with a DescriptionTerm.

parts.name: DescriptionList
parts.description: Semantic description list root (`<dl>`). Compose with DescriptionTerm and DescriptionDetails to build accessible key–value displays.

parts.name: DescriptionTerm

name: Detail Sheet
description: A right-anchored (by default) detail / inspection panel built as a structured recipe over the design-system Sheet.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the sheet is currently open.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback invoked whenever the sheet requests an open-state change. The first argument is the requested `open` value; forward it to your state setter to keep the sheet controlled.

props.name: title
props.description: Main heading rendered in a SheetTitle.

props.name: meta
props.description: Optional muted subtitle rendered beneath the title (e.g. a record ID or status chip). Mapped to `SheetDescription` so it doubles as the accessible description for screen readers.

props.name: footer
props.description: Optional sticky footer rendered via SheetFooter. Typically holds a primary action and a cancel/close control.

props.name: children
props.description: The scrollable body of the sheet. Typically composed of DetailSheetSection blocks each containing DetailSheetRow pairs.

props.name: side
props.description: Which screen edge the sheet slides in from. Forwarded directly to `SheetContent`'s `side` prop.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the `SheetContent` element.

props.name: label
props.description: Muted descriptor rendered on the left side of the row.

props.name: children
props.description: The value displayed on the right side, wrapped in `font-mono text-xs` styling by default. Pass a pre-styled node to override the wrapper.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the row's `flex` wrapper `<div>`.

props.name: heading
props.description: Section heading rendered as an uppercase muted `<h4>`. Keep it short — one or two words.

props.name: children
props.description: The section body; typically one or more DetailSheetRows.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the `<section>` element.

parts.name: DetailSheet
parts.description: A right-anchored (by default) detail / inspection panel built as a structured recipe over the design-system Sheet.

parts.name: DetailSheetRow
parts.description: A single label/value pair inside a DetailSheetSection.

parts.name: DetailSheetSection
parts.description: A labelled group of DetailSheetRow entries inside a DetailSheet body.

name: Dialog
description: Modal overlay that interrupts the user to focus on a single task or message.

inheritedProps.name: actionsRef
inheritedProps.description: A ref to imperative actions. - `unmount`: When specified, the dialog will not be unmounted when closed. Instead, the `unmount` function must be called to unmount the dialog manually. Useful when the dialog's animation is controlled by an external library. - `close`: Closes the dialog imperatively when called.

inheritedProps.name: defaultOpen
inheritedProps.description: Whether the dialog is initially open.

inheritedProps.name: defaultTriggerId
inheritedProps.description: ID of the trigger that the dialog is associated with. This is useful in conjunction with the `defaultOpen` prop to create an initially open dialog.

inheritedProps.name: disablePointerDismissal
inheritedProps.description: Determines whether the dialog should close on outside clicks.

inheritedProps.name: handle
inheritedProps.description: A handle to associate the dialog with a trigger. If specified, allows external triggers to control the dialog's open state. Can be created with the Dialog.createHandle() method.

inheritedProps.name: modal
inheritedProps.description: Determines if the dialog enters a modal state when open. - `true`: user interaction is limited to just the dialog: focus is trapped, document page scroll is locked, and pointer interactions on outside elements are disabled. - `false`: user interaction with the rest of the document is allowed. - `'trap-focus'`: focus is trapped inside the dialog, but document page scroll is not locked and pointer interactions outside of it remain enabled.

inheritedProps.name: onOpenChange
inheritedProps.description: Event handler called when the dialog is opened or closed.

inheritedProps.name: onOpenChangeComplete
inheritedProps.description: Event handler called after any animations complete when the dialog is opened or closed.

inheritedProps.name: open
inheritedProps.description: Whether the dialog is currently open.

inheritedProps.name: triggerId
inheritedProps.description: ID of the trigger that the dialog is associated with. This is useful in conjunction with the `open` prop to create a controlled dialog. There's no need to specify this prop when the dialog is uncontrolled (that is, when the `open` prop is not set).

parts.name: Dialog
parts.description: Modal overlay that interrupts the user to focus on a single task or message.

parts.name: DialogClose
parts.description: Programmatic close control for the Dialog.

parts.name: DialogContent
parts.description: Scrollable panel that holds the dialog body.

parts.name: DialogDescription
parts.description: Muted supporting text beneath DialogTitle.

parts.name: DialogFooter
parts.description: Bottom action bar for DialogContent.

parts.name: DialogHeader
parts.description: Top region of DialogContent for DialogTitle and DialogDescription.

parts.name: DialogOverlay
parts.description: Semi-transparent backdrop rendered behind DialogContent. Animates in/out with a fade; applies a backdrop blur when the browser supports the `backdrop-filter` API.

parts.name: DialogPortal
parts.description: Teleports DialogContent outside the current DOM tree into `document.body`, escaping any overflow or stacking-context constraints.

parts.name: DialogTitle
parts.description: Accessible heading for the Dialog, announced by screen readers when the dialog opens. Always provide this (or a visually-hidden equivalent) for a11y.

parts.name: DialogTrigger
parts.description: Button or element that opens the Dialog when activated.

name: Diff Snippet
description: Compact, read-only code-diff display for release notes, examples, and docs.

props.name: lines

props.name: filename
props.description: Optional filename shown in the header.

props.name: language
props.description: Optional language label shown in the header.

props.name: copyable
props.description: Whether to show a clipboard button for the diff text.

props.name: showLineNumbers
props.description: Whether to render a numbered gutter beside each row.

parts.name: DiffSnippet
parts.description: Compact, read-only code-diff display for release notes, examples, and docs.

name: direction
description: Re-exports Base UI's direction utilities for setting and reading the text directionality (`"ltr"` | `"rtl"`) of the component tree.

name: Drawer
description: Edge-anchored panel that slides in from any side of the viewport, powered by the Vaul library.

inheritedProps.name: closeThreshold
inheritedProps.description: Number between 0 and 1 that determines when the drawer should be closed. Example: threshold of 0.5 would close the drawer if the user swiped for 50% of the height of the drawer or more.

inheritedProps.name: defaultOpen
inheritedProps.description: Opened by default, skips initial enter animation. Still reacts to `open` state changes

inheritedProps.name: disablePreventScroll
inheritedProps.description: When set to `true` prevents scrolling on the document body on mount, and restores it on unmount.

inheritedProps.name: dismissible
inheritedProps.description: When `false` dragging, clicking outside, pressing esc, etc. will not close the drawer. Use this in comination with the `open` prop, otherwise you won't be able to open/close the drawer.

inheritedProps.name: fadeFromIndex
inheritedProps.description: Index of a `snapPoint` from which the overlay fade should be applied. Defaults to the last snap point.

inheritedProps.name: fixed
inheritedProps.description: When `true`, don't move the drawer upwards if there's space, but rather only change it's height so it's fully scrollable when the keyboard is open

inheritedProps.name: handleOnly
inheritedProps.description: When `true` only allows the drawer to be dragged by the `<Drawer.Handle />` component.

inheritedProps.name: modal
inheritedProps.description: When `false` it allows to interact with elements outside of the drawer without closing it.

inheritedProps.name: noBodyStyles
inheritedProps.description: When `true` the `body` doesn't get any styles assigned from Vaul

inheritedProps.name: repositionInputs
inheritedProps.description: When `true` Vaul will reposition inputs rather than scroll then into view if the keyboard is in the way. Setting it to `false` will fall back to the default browser behavior.

inheritedProps.name: scrollLockTimeout
inheritedProps.description: Duration for which the drawer is not draggable after scrolling content inside of the drawer.

inheritedProps.name: setBackgroundColorOnScale
inheritedProps.description: When `false` we don't change body's background color when the drawer is open.

inheritedProps.name: snapPoints
inheritedProps.description: Array of numbers from 0 to 100 that corresponds to % of the screen a given snap point should take up. Should go from least visible. Example `[0.2, 0.5, 0.8]`. You can also use px values, which doesn't take screen height into account.

inheritedProps.name: snapToSequentialPoint
inheritedProps.description: Disabled velocity based swiping for snap points. This means that a snap point won't be skipped even if the velocity is high enough. Useful if each snap point in a drawer is equally important.

parts.name: Drawer
parts.description: Edge-anchored panel that slides in from any side of the viewport, powered by the Vaul library.

parts.name: DrawerClose
parts.description: Programmatic close control for the Drawer.

parts.name: DrawerContent
parts.description: The sliding panel itself.

parts.name: DrawerDescription
parts.description: Muted supporting text beneath DrawerTitle.

parts.name: DrawerFooter
parts.description: Bottom action bar for DrawerContent; pushes to the end of the flex column with `mt-auto`.

parts.name: DrawerHeader
parts.description: Top region of DrawerContent for DrawerTitle and DrawerDescription. Text is centred for `top`/`bottom` drawers and left-aligned for `left`/`right` drawers on `md+` screens.

parts.name: DrawerOverlay
parts.description: Semi-transparent backdrop behind DrawerContent; fades in/out and applies a backdrop blur when the browser supports it.

parts.name: DrawerPortal
parts.description: Teleports DrawerContent outside the DOM tree into `document.body`, escaping overflow/stacking-context constraints.

parts.name: DrawerTitle
parts.description: Accessible heading for the Drawer, announced by screen readers when the panel opens. Always provide this for a11y.

parts.name: DrawerTrigger
parts.description: Button or element that opens the Drawer when activated.

name: Dropdown Menu
description: Floating list of actions that opens from a trigger button.

inheritedProps.name: actionsRef
inheritedProps.description: A ref to imperative actions. - `unmount`: When specified, the menu will not be unmounted when closed. Instead, the `unmount` function must be called to unmount the menu manually. Useful when the menu's animation is controlled by an external library. - `close`: When specified, the menu can be closed imperatively.

inheritedProps.name: closeParentOnEsc
inheritedProps.description: When in a submenu, determines whether pressing the Escape key closes the entire menu, or only the current child menu.

inheritedProps.name: defaultOpen
inheritedProps.description: Whether the menu is initially open.

inheritedProps.name: defaultTriggerId
inheritedProps.description: ID of the trigger that the popover is associated with. This is useful in conjunction with the `defaultOpen` prop to create an initially open popover.

inheritedProps.name: handle
inheritedProps.description: A handle to associate the menu with a trigger. If specified, allows external triggers to control the menu's open state.

inheritedProps.name: highlightItemOnHover
inheritedProps.description: Whether moving the pointer over items should highlight them. Disabling this prop allows CSS `:hover` to be differentiated from the `:focus` (`data-highlighted`) state.

inheritedProps.name: loopFocus
inheritedProps.description: Whether to loop keyboard focus back to the first item when the end of the list is reached while using the arrow keys.

inheritedProps.name: modal
inheritedProps.description: Determines if the menu enters a modal state when open. - `true`: user interaction is limited to the menu: document page scroll is locked and pointer interactions on outside elements are disabled. - `false`: user interaction with the rest of the document is allowed.

inheritedProps.name: onOpenChange
inheritedProps.description: Event handler called when the menu is opened or closed.

inheritedProps.name: onOpenChangeComplete
inheritedProps.description: Event handler called after any animations complete when the menu is closed.

inheritedProps.name: open
inheritedProps.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

inheritedProps.name: triggerId
inheritedProps.description: ID of the trigger that the popover is associated with. This is useful in conjunction with the `open` prop to create a controlled popover. There's no need to specify this prop when the popover is uncontrolled (that is, when the `open` prop is not set).

parts.name: DropdownMenu
parts.description: Floating list of actions that opens from a trigger button.

parts.name: DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
parts.description: A checkable item inside DropdownMenuContent.

parts.name: DropdownMenuContent
parts.description: Floating panel that holds all menu items for DropdownMenu.

parts.name: DropdownMenuGroup
parts.description: Semantic grouping wrapper for related DropdownMenuItems. Pair with DropdownMenuLabel to add a visible group heading.

parts.name: DropdownMenuItem
parts.description: A single selectable action row inside DropdownMenuContent.

parts.name: DropdownMenuLabel
parts.description: Non-interactive heading above a group of items in DropdownMenuContent.

parts.name: DropdownMenuPortal
parts.description: Teleports DropdownMenuContent outside the DOM tree into `document.body`, escaping overflow/stacking-context constraints.

parts.name: DropdownMenuRadioGroup
parts.description: Groups DropdownMenuRadioItems so only one can be checked at a time. Manage selection with the primitive's `value` / `onValueChange` props.

parts.name: DropdownMenuRadioItem
parts.description: A radio-style item inside DropdownMenuRadioGroup.

parts.name: DropdownMenuSeparator
parts.description: Horizontal divider between groups in DropdownMenuContent.

parts.name: DropdownMenuShortcut
parts.description: Trailing keyboard shortcut hint inside a DropdownMenuItem.

parts.name: DropdownMenuSub
parts.description: Root container for a nested submenu inside DropdownMenu. Pair with DropdownMenuSubTrigger and DropdownMenuSubContent.

parts.name: DropdownMenuSubContent
parts.description: Floating panel for a nested submenu, anchored to its DropdownMenuSubTrigger.

parts.name: DropdownMenuSubTrigger
parts.description: Item row that opens a nested DropdownMenuSubContent on hover or focus. Renders a trailing right-arrow icon automatically.

parts.name: DropdownMenuTrigger
parts.description: Button or element that opens the DropdownMenu when activated.

name: Empty

parts.name: Empty

props.name: total

props.name: showLegend

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Formats a raw numeric value for display in tooltips and the legend.

name: Feature Lock
description: Gating overlay that visually locks content behind an upsell prompt.

props.name: plan
props.description: The plan name displayed inside the badge, e.g. `"Pro"` or `"Enterprise"`.

inheritedProps.name: dismissible
inheritedProps.description: When `true`, appends a dismiss `<button>` containing Cancel01Icon.

inheritedProps.name: dot
inheritedProps.description: When `true`, prepends a small leading dot before children (and before `iconLeft`). The dot colour tracks `currentColor` (`bg-current`) so it inherits the variant's text colour automatically.

inheritedProps.name: dotClassName
inheritedProps.description: Extra Tailwind classes merged onto the leading dot `<span>`.

inheritedProps.name: iconLeft
inheritedProps.description: Icon rendered immediately before children.

inheritedProps.name: iconRight
inheritedProps.description: Icon rendered immediately after children.

inheritedProps.name: mono
inheritedProps.description: When `true`, applies `font-mono uppercase tracking-wide` for monospaced label styling — useful for version numbers, codes, or IDs.

inheritedProps.name: onDismiss
inheritedProps.description: Called when the dismiss button is clicked.

inheritedProps.name: render
inheritedProps.description: Allows you to replace the component's HTML element with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

inheritedProps.name: variant
inheritedProps.description: Colour and emphasis style applied via badgeVariants. Includes solid fills, tinted `*-light` fills, bordered `*-outline` variants, `ghost`, and `link`.

props.name: locked
props.description: When `true` the gating overlay is shown and children are visually obscured. When `false` children are rendered unchanged with no wrapper.

props.name: children
props.description: The content to gate — rendered normally when unlocked.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown in the overlay, e.g. `"Upgrade to Pro"`. Accepts any renderable content.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting body copy shown below the title in the overlay. Accepts any renderable content.
